在这里，你可以看到：
经典触手大眼珠子一锅炖的克苏鲁吉祥物；
能念咒语，法伤拉满的脆皮炮台；
经常在战争迷雾里打游击，偷鸡不成的神秘小黑人；
操控命运，战力基本在扯淡排行榜里位列仙班的抽象怪；
无限成长，但一口吃不着，只能由信徒在三维世界幻想无敌的贪吃蛇；
随迟但到，打完一层又一层的阶段性套娃BOSS；
还有数值怪加机制怪的美少女缝合邪神......等等，你为什么还没长触手？

主角小梅希也很可爱，有优点有缺点，有同理心但也不圣母。现在剧情有点橘里橘气的，虽然希望小梅希永远单着，不过百合到也勉强接受，只要不刀小松鼠就行","text_exts":[{"e":42,"s":39,"text":"普通人","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%99%AE%E9%80%9A%E4%BA%BA&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317742024171391A6E0%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227478483953038295833%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227354900547167587352%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%99%AE%E9%80%9A%E4%BA%BA%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1741224613,"group_id":"7354900547167587352","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NyaulXIwoBKI1mSS2XGOCDCZpmdKKpqNyfxmvwUEE3bO","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/8b91e01a7b0242389b43128fe854e4b7~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776789360&x-signature=kF0qy%2FZCs5KDejK6auO%2FMmXI91c%3D","user_id":"2057891321229790","user_name":"爱吃全麦可颂的青仙子"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2057891321229790","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1644318357,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE4D8","can_worn":false,"id":4,"name":"元气满满","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9b065c2d8cda96cbf7fdda5c311d871a","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d04cdb6a2447c1029287dc9120659d09"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7354900547167587352","book_info":{"abstract":"欢迎来到这个邪神污染下，风土、生态、科技都畸形发育的后启示录时代。
